item.legendarymonuments.cosmic_bag.toolt: A catalyst that has the power of the cosmos. It can collect and store cosmic dust
item.legendarymonuments.curry_of_justice: A delicious curry that lures Keldeo.
item.legendarymonuments.dream_string.dro: You found a Dream String in the darkness!
item.legendarymonuments.fullmoon_whistle: A whistle that produces a sound you remember from your dreams
A whistle that produces a sound you remember from your nightmares
item.legendarymonuments.red_chain.toolti: Used to summon Palkia and Dialga at the Spear Pillar and to craft Ancient Origin Balls
Can be fixed with origin ingots found in the Distortion World
item.legendarymonuments.sacred_ash.drop: You collected the pokemon ashes and got a Sacred Ash bag
item.legendarymonuments.sacred_ash.heal_: Your Pokémon have been fully restored!
item.legendarymonuments.sacred_ash.no_ef: Your Pokémon are already at full health and PP!
item.legendarymonuments.sacred_ash.toolt: Acquired by defeating pokemon with Ho-oh in your party, restores your entire party's HP and PP. Can't be used mid-battle
item.legendarymonuments.silver_wing.tool: Increases Lugia's Special Attack and Special Defense by 50% when held.
item.legendarymonuments.titan_hammer.too: A mighty hammer that shakes the earth
item.legendarymonuments.urn.complete: Your urn is now fully charged! Right-click again to summon a legendary Pokémon!
item.legendarymonuments.urn.spawned: The power of the urn summons %s!
item.legendarymonuments.urn.spawned.shin: The power of the urn summons a SHINY %s!
item.legendarymonuments.urn.tooltip.inst: Defeat Pokémon of the matching type to charge
item.legendarymonuments.urn.tooltip.read: Ready to summon! Right-click to release the power
item.legendarymonuments.urn.update: Your urn absorbs energy from %s! Progress: %d/%d
item.legendarymonuments.vortex_stone.too: A stone infused with the torrential power of Articuno, Zapdos, and Moltres. Whoever possesses this stone has earned the right to challenge Lugia.
message.legendarymonuments.distortion_lo: You fell in the void and were brought back up
message.legendarymonuments.enter_hall_of: A faint melody carries you to the Hall of Origin...
message.legendarymonuments.exit_hall_of_: You return from the Hall of Origin.
message.legendarymonuments.hall_origin_v: You feel a guiding presence and are returned to the Hall's center.
message.legendarymonuments.system_upgrad: You don't have the required items in your inventory.
